emails.body: Meeting with Linda Robertson and Chris Long Tana, Rick Shapiro has just scheduled a conference call at 10:30 AM Friday, 12/15/00. Could Linda Roberston and Chris Long arrive 15 minutes later for your meeting on Friday? Hope this works. Thanks! Lora Sullivan Federal Government Affairs Representative Enron 1775 Eye Street, NW Suite 800 Washington, DC 20006 202-466-9142 202-828-3372 (fax) email: lsulliv@enron.com 10:45 AM.-12:30 PM Meeting w/ Tana Jones EB 3802 Arranged by Taffy 713-345-7373
